# NOTE
# - This file was generated from the current Windows venv via `uv pip freeze`.
# - It intentionally EXCLUDES GPU/backend-specific packages that are highly system-dependent:
#   - torch / torchvision / torchaudio (install separately for your CUDA version)
#   - flash-attn (FlashAttention)
#   - sageattention (SageAttention)
#
# Recommended:
# 1) Install PyTorch (and optionally flash-attn / sageattention) first for your CUDA setup.
# 2) Then install everything here with uv (see command in the README / notes).
